-- file: schema.sql
CREATE TABLE products (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    sku TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    price REAL NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
    notes TEXT NULL
);

-- file: query.sql
SELECT name, sql
FROM sqlite_master
WHERE type = 'table' AND name = 'products';

recipe.solutionCode:
-- file: schema.sql
CREATE TABLE products (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    sku TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    price REAL NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
    notes TEXT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE stock_events (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    quantity_change INTEGER NOT NULL,
    event_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'receipt',
    note TEXT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id)
);

-- file: query.sql
SELECT name, sql
FROM sqlite_master
WHERE type = 'table' AND name IN ('products', 'stock_events')
ORDER BY name;

-- file: schema.sql
CREATE TABLE products (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    sku TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    price REAL NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
    notes TEXT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE stock_events (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    quantity_change INTEGER NOT NULL,

-- file: seed.sql
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, category, price, notes) VALUES
    ('SKU001', 'Product A', 'Category 1', 19.99, NULL),
    ('SKU002', 'Product B', 'Category 2', 29.99, 'Special edition'),
    ('SKU003', 'Product C', 'Category 3', 39.99, NULL);

-- file: query.sql
SELECT id, sku, name, category, price, status, notes
FROM products
ORDER BY id;

recipe.solutionCode:
-- file: schema.sql
CREATE TABLE products (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    sku TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    price REAL NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
    notes TEXT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE stock_events (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    quantity_change INTEGER NOT NULL,
    event_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'receipt',
    note TEXT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id)
);

-- file: seed.sql
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, category, price, notes) VALUES
    ('SKU001', 'Product A', 'Category 1', 19.99, NULL),
    ('SKU002', 'Product B', 'Category 2', 29.99, 'Special edition'),
    ('SKU003', 'Product C', 'Category 3', 39.99, NULL);

INSERT INTO stock_events (product_id, quantity_change, event_type, note) VALUES
    (1, 100, 'receipt', 'Initial stock'),
    (2, 50, 'receipt', 'Restock'),
    (3, 30, 'receipt', 'New shipment'),
    (1, 0, 'adjustment', 'Test event');

-- file: query.sql
SELECT id, product_id, quantity_change, event_type, note
FROM stock_events
ORDER BY id;

recipe.solutionCode:
-- file: schema.sql
CREATE TABLE products (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    sku TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    price REAL NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
    notes TEXT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE stock_events (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    quantity_change INTEGER NOT NULL,
    event_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'receipt',
    note TEXT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id)
);

-- file: seed.sql
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, category, price, notes) VALUES
    ('SKU001', 'Product A', 'Category 1', 19.99, NULL),
    ('SKU002', 'Product B', 'Category 2', 29.99, 'Special edition'),
    ('SKU003', 'Product C', 'Category 3', 39.99, NULL);

INSERT INTO stock_events (product_id, quantity_change, event_type, note) VALUES
    (1, 100, 'receipt', 'Initial stock'),
    (2, 50, 'receipt', 'Restock'),
    (3, 30, 'receipt', 'New shipment'),
    (1, 0, 'adjustment', 'Test event');

-- file: operations.sql
UPDATE products
SET
    price = 24.99,
    status = 'active'
WHERE
    id = 1;

-- file: query.sql
SELECT id, sku, price, status
FROM products
WHERE id = 1;

recipe.solutionCode:
-- file: schema.sql
CREATE TABLE products (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    sku TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    category TEXT NOT NULL,
    price REAL NOT NULL,
    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
    notes TEXT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE stock_events (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    quantity_change INTEGER NOT NULL,
    event_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'receipt',
    note TEXT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(id)
);

-- file: seed.sql
INSERT INTO products (sku, name, category, price, notes) VALUES
    ('SKU001', 'Product A', 'Category 1', 19.99, NULL),
    ('SKU002', 'Product B', 'Category 2', 29.99, 'Special edition'),
    ('SKU003', 'Product C', 'Category 3', 39.99, NULL);

INSERT INTO stock_events (product_id, quantity_change, event_type, note) VALUES
    (1, 100, 'receipt', 'Initial stock'),
    (2, 50, 'receipt', 'Restock'),
    (3, 30, 'receipt', 'New shipment'),
    (1, 0, 'adjustment', 'Test event');

-- file: operations.sql
UPDATE products
SET
    price = 24.99,
    status = 'active'
WHERE
    id = 1;

DELETE FROM stock_events
WHERE
    note = 'Test event';

-- file: query.sql
SELECT id, product_id, quantity_change, event_type, note
FROM stock_events
ORDER BY id;
